race.comment: PARADING GUS (3) has been consistent without winning hitting the top-five in all nine career outings to date and this is not an overly strong affair. Has placed two of three over this sprint journey and is drawn to get a soft run from gate two. Will prove very hard to toss. GOSSAMER GLOW (7) finished runner-up over this trip last time out and only needs some luck navigating from the sticky draw to be playing a role in the finish. Former Victorian MONGOLIAN SPRING (1) is having the first run for the new stable but should find this a touch easier than what he faced down south. Respect any market confidence. The well-bred STARLIGHTNING (4) (dam was a Listed winner) is on debut but has shown ability at the trials and is sure to be well-educated out of the Gollan yard. Include with the claim from the inside alley. EMPHATIQUE (6) best of the rest while fresh.
